Hendrick Goltzius

12 works in the gallery.

by Hendrick Goltzius

by Hendrick Goltzius

by Hendrick Goltzius
Netherlands · 1588 · Chiaroscuro woodcut from three blocks in black
A Nude Female Figure Fleeing to the Right with Arms Outstretched, with Sketch of a Bust of Secondary Figure (recto); A Sketch of a Nude, Kneeling Female Figure, Supported by Another Standing (verso)
by Hendrick Goltzius
Netherlands · 1595–1605 · Black and red chalk
Vries, Frederik de (died 1613) son of the painter Dirck de Vries, pupil of Goltzius, with Goltzius's dog
by Hendrick Goltzius
Netherlands · 1597 · Engraving in black on ivory laid paper
The Last Supper, plate one from The Passion of Christ
by Hendrick Goltzius
Netherlands · 1598 · Engraving in black on cream laid paper
Dying Adonis
by Hendrick Goltzius
Northern Mannerism · 1609
Adonis collapses from the boar's wound, Venus grieving over him — Goltzius's only surviving painting in the Rijksmuseum, from a printmaker who spent most of his career with a burin.
←Goltzius Huang Gongwang→
